lint.observation: Prettier format check failed with code style issues in 63 files. Run Prettier with --write to fix.

blockingIssues.description: Format check (Prettier) failed: 63 TypeScript files have code style issues. This is a blocking issue that must be fixed before proceeding to feature review.
blockingIssues.suggestedFix: Run 'npm run format' to automatically fix all formatting issues with Prettier, then verify with 'npm run format:check'.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add 'format' command to services.yaml validators. Currently services.yaml only has 'test', 'typecheck', 'build', 'lint' (which doesn't exist), 'secret-scan', 'release-check', and 'validate:skills'. The 'format:check' command should be added as a validator or the non-existent 'lint' entry should be replaced with 'format:check'.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Scrutiny validation attempted to run 'npm run lint' which doesn't exist. The actual code style validator is 'npm run format:check'.
